codeReview.evidence: Final code review approved the scoped diff after the scripts/windows-hotkey.ps1 default was fixed to shift+space.

manualQa.evidence: Surface verifier final reverify passed npm test, dry-run surfaces, Windows helper scan, no-restore scan, scope/doc-trigger/dd guard checks, and cleanup.

surfaceEvidence.invocation: node bin/lazycopy.js appshot hotkey install --app Codex --dry-run --json
node bin/lazycopy.js appshot hotkey install --key control+space --app Codex --dry-run --json
git status --short, git diff --name-only, product Markdown trigger scan, dd behavior diff guard

adversarialCases.scenario: Ctrl+Space conflicted with Codex window sizing, so the default must move to Shift+Space without removing explicit custom-key support.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Default dry-run and raw Windows helper use shift+space, while explicit --key control+space remains supported.

adversarialCases.scenario: AppShot paste should not restore, resize, maximize, or minimize the target Codex window.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Paste path only foregrounds and sends Ctrl+V; restore/resize tokens are absent.

adversarialCases.scenario: AppShot must not become a chat command and dd behavior must remain separate.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Product docs contain no /appshot or $appshot trigger, and core dd files are unchanged.

artifactRefs.description: Default AppShot hotkey dry-run emits shift+space and not control+space.
Explicit control+space custom key dry-run still works.
Windows direct hotkey helper defaults to shift+space.
Windows paste script has no restore or resize tokens.
Scope, doc trigger, and dd behavior guard receipt.
Cleanup receipt showing no QA processes or temp roots remain.
Manual QA matrix for the final AppShot outcome.
Independent B surface verifier final report.

gateReview.evidence: Final gate review approved after the code review CLEAR report, manual QA matrix, and final B evidence were present.

rerunCommands: node bin/lazycopy.js appshot hotkey install --app Codex --dry-run --json
node bin/lazycopy.js appshot hotkey install --key control+space --app Codex --dry-run --json
iteration.evidence: Final B reverify receipts and code review receipts passed after the Windows helper default follow-up.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: User wanted Shift+Space AppShot hotkey without Codex window resizing, while dd remains a separate clipboard-to-agent surface.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: LazyCopy AppShot installs and documents Shift+Space by default, supports explicit control+space, foreground-pastes without restore or resize, and leaves dd behavior intact.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: Evidence confirms npm test 20/20, default and custom dry-run surfaces, raw Windows helper default, no restore/resize scan, product doc trigger scan, cleanup, code review CLEAR, and independent surface verification.
